description:
Recto: Legal document (warranty). in which al-Shaykh al-ʿAmīd declares that he guarantees something for his brother Avraham and his son Yosef and other people. The numbers 1592 and 1593 appear, possibly dates (if so would correspond to ca. 1281 CE, which is consistent with the paleography and typical names). 

Verso: accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals, mentioning people such as a shipowner (nākhūda), Rashīd, Makīn, Sadīd, Mukhallaṣ, Mūsā, and ʿAmīd.

(Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
